query: /data-wizard model I need to predict customer churn from behavioral features. What ML model should I use?
expected_behavior: Agent routes to Model Selection mode based on 'model' keyword
Agent classifies as Standard tier (predictive modeling task)
Agent runs model-recommender.py with binary classification task parameters
Agent reads references/model-selection.md for detailed guidance
Agent identifies the task as binary classification (churn vs. no churn)
Agent presents ranked model recommendations with tradeoffs (interpretability, performance, data requirements)
Agent recommends a baseline model (logistic regression) per Critical Rule 5
Agent suggests train/val/test split strategy and appropriate evaluation metrics (precision, recall, AUC)
Agent addresses class imbalance considerations common in churn prediction
